# Moissanite by Aurelia

> Expert jewelry guides on moissanite, diamonds, and gemstones by Mehedi Hasan. Cited in People, Us Weekly, and Page Six. 500K+ annual readers, 3+ years of publishing.

Moissanite by Aurelia is a jewelry education and affiliate review site. Content covers moissanite, natural diamonds, lab-grown diamonds, colored gemstones, and fine jewelry retailers. All content is written by Mehedi Hasan, a gemstone researcher and jewelry educator.

## Core Guides

- [Moissanite Complete Guide](https://moissanitebyaurelia.com/moissanite/): Everything about moissanite — properties, quality, pricing, and best places to buy
- [Diamond Buying Guide](https://moissanitebyaurelia.com/diamond-buying-guide/): How to buy diamonds — the 4Cs, certifications, and avoiding overpaying
- [Moissanite vs Diamond](https://moissanitebyaurelia.com/which-is-more-sparkly-diamond-or-moissanite/): Side-by-side comparison of brilliance, hardness, price, and ethics
- [Lab-Grown Diamond Guide](https://moissanitebyaurelia.com/category/lab-grown-diamond/): Complete guide to lab diamonds — IGI vs GIA, retailers, and value
- [Sapphire Guide](https://moissanitebyaurelia.com/category/gemstone/sapphire-guide/): Blue, pink, and padparadscha sapphires explained
- [Engagement Ring Buying Guide](https://moissanitebyaurelia.com/category/diamond-buying-guide/engagement-ring-buying-guide/): How to choose the right ring

## Retailer Reviews

- [Blue Nile Review](https://moissanitebyaurelia.com/blue-nile-reviews/): Best overall diamond retailer — pricing, selection, and customer experience
- [James Allen Review](https://moissanitebyaurelia.com/james-allen-review/): Best 360° HD diamond video — see every diamond before buying
- [Charles & Colvard Review](https://moissanitebyaurelia.com/charles-and-colvard-reviews/): Original moissanite brand — Forever One quality
- [Rare Carat Review](https://moissanitebyaurelia.com/rare-carat-reviews-legit/): AI-powered diamond price comparison tool
- [Ritani Review](https://moissanitebyaurelia.com/is-ritani-legit/): Try-at-home engagement ring program
- [All Retailer Reviews](https://moissanitebyaurelia.com/category/diamond-review/): Full list of jewelry retailer reviews

## Calculators & Tools

- [Diamond Appraisal Calculator](https://moissanitebyaurelia.com/diamond-appraisal-calculator/): Estimate market, insurance, and resale value
- [Moissanite Price Calculator](https://moissanitebyaurelia.com/moissanite-price-calculator/): Compare moissanite prices across retailers
- [Moissanite vs Diamond Price Calculator](https://moissanitebyaurelia.com/moissanite-vs-diamond-price-calculator/): See exactly how much you save with moissanite
- [Diamond Resale Calculator](https://moissanitebyaurelia.com/diamond-resale-price-calculator/): Estimate cash offer vs trade-in value
- [Diamond Rate Calculator](https://moissanitebyaurelia.com/diamond-rate-calculator/): Fair market price by cut, color, and clarity
- [Pearl Value Calculator](https://moissanitebyaurelia.com/pearl-value-calculator/): Freshwater, Akoya, and South Sea pearl pricing
- [Best Engagement Ring Finder](https://moissanitebyaurelia.com/best-place-to-buy-engagement-rings-online-tool/): Interactive tool to match retailer to needs

## Coupons & Deals

- [All Jewelry Coupons](https://moissanitebyaurelia.com/jewelry-coupons/): Best active promo codes across all retailers
- [Blue Nile Promo Code](https://moissanitebyaurelia.com/blue-nile-promo-code/): Verified Blue Nile discount codes
- [James Allen Promo Code](https://moissanitebyaurelia.com/james-allen-promotional-code/): Latest James Allen deals
- [Charles & Colvard Discount](https://moissanitebyaurelia.com/charles-and-colvard-discount-code/): C&C sale codes and offers

## About

- [About Mehedi Hasan](https://moissanitebyaurelia.com/about-mehedi/): Founder, gemstone researcher, jewelry educator

- [Shop Fine Jewelry](https://moissanitebyaurelia.com/shop-fine-jewelry/): Curated jewelry product listings
